ast_greeting: Namaste! I am your One Vote Assistant. How can I help you today? You can say 'Register to vote', 'Find my booth', or 'Election process'.
ast_register_info: To register as a new voter, you need to be an Indian citizen and 18 years or older. You must fill out Form 6. You can do this online through the Voter Service Portal or offline through your local Booth Level Officer. Keep your Aadhar card, address proof, and passport photo ready. Shall I open the official registration portal for you?
ast_booth_info: To find your polling booth, you will need your Voter ID number, also known as your EPIC number. You can search for your name on the electoral roll online to find the exact location of your voting station. Shall I open the booth finder page for you?
ast_process_info: The election process starts with the Election Commission announcing the dates. Then candidates file their nominations, followed by political campaigning. On election day, you go to your booth, verify your identity, and cast your vote on the EVM. Finally, votes are counted and results are declared. Would you like to read the detailed steps?
ast_confirm_no: No problem. Is there anything else I can help you with?
ast_goodbye: Thank you for using One Vote. Have a great day! Jai Hind!
ast_not_understood: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. You can tap one of the buttons below or type your answer.
